name: FNB MidCap ETF
dividend: Quarterly | Last 4: Dec 2025: 8.65 cpu, Sep 2025: 5.37 cpu, Jun 2025: 6.60 cpu, Mar 2025: 4.40 cpu
index_rules: To provide investors with exposure to the SA equities market through a JSE-listed ETF representing the FTSE/JSE Mid Cap Index. Invests in companies ranked 41st to 100th largest on the JSE by market capitalisation. The Mid Cap Index market representation target is 85%-96% of the FTSE/JSE All Share Index. Pays quarterly distributions.
